[Describe the purpose of this Pull Request]

## Accessibility Checklist
Please verify the following qualitative accessibility requirements before merging:

- [ ] **Semantic Labels**: ARIA labels and alt text provide clear, concise descriptions of the element's purpose and are not redundant.
- [ ] **Logical Tab Order**: The tab navigation order matches the visual layout sequence, especially in complex interfaces like `TabbedFormLayout`.
- [ ] **Keyboard Navigation**: All interactive elements are reachable and usable via keyboard.
- [ ] **Visual Hierarchy**: The use of headings (H1-H6) follows a logical structure without skipping levels.

## Other Changes
- [ ] Code compiles without linting errors.
- [ ] Tests pass locally.
